title: fix_pipeline_next_decide_fix_response
description: Response schema for the fix_pipeline_next_decide_fix agent that decides whether to add a comment, add code suggestions or push changes.

decision.description: Use 'create_fix_on_existing_mr' when a merge request URL is provided and all files to modify are in the MR diff. Use 'create_fix_on_new_mr' when no merge request URL is provided. Use 'add_comment' when a merge request URL is provided but some files to modify are not in the MR diff.
